game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Pocket Academy 3:** Players manage and expand a high school on a grid-based map, constructing various facilities like classrooms, cafeterias, and club rooms by tapping on a build menu and dragging them into position. The core loop involves strategically placing compatible facilities adjacent to each other to create "popular spots" that boost student satisfaction and school reputation, which in turn increases student enrollment applications each year. Students progress through grades, join various clubs (e.g., baseball, science), and participate in practice matches and national tournaments, with player management influencing their training and performance through resource allocation and facility upgrades. Progression is driven by increasing school popularity and reputation points, unlocking new and more advanced facilities, clubs, and annual events like school festivals, and guiding students through placement tests to achieve their career dreams. The user interface supports drag-to-scroll navigation and pinch-to-zoom for detailed map management, with success measured by student graduation rates, club victories (e.g., winning 3 national tournaments), and overall school ranking, all while balancing a dynamic budget.
game_info.description: Welcome to Pocket Academy 3! You are the principal of a new high school. Build and place facilities like classrooms, cafeterias, and club rooms on your campus grid to attract students and boost your school's reputation. Strategic placement creates "popular spots" that increase student satisfaction. Guide students through grades, manage clubs, compete in tournaments, and watch your school grow from a small academy to a prestigious institution. Your goal is to achieve maximum school ranking by increasing enrollment, winning tournaments, and graduating successful students.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate/move cursor on grid
Space: Select/place facility or confirm action
Z: Cancel/go back in menus
Shift: Open build menu / toggle menu
R: Restart game (from game over screen)
Enter: Start game (from start screen)
Esc: Pause/unpause game

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic facility placement and navigation. This test validates that the player can navigate the grid, open the build menu, and place facilities correctly on empty tiles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate to various positions on the grid, open the build menu using Shift, select different facility types, and place them on the grid. Verify that facilities are correctly positioned and the grid state updates.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test successfully places multiple facilities on the grid without errors. The game state correctly tracks placed facilities, the budget decreases appropriately, and no facilities overlap.

TEST_1.expected: The test successfully places multiple facilities on the grid without errors. The game state correctly tracks placed facilities, the budget decreases appropriately, and no facilities overlap.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the win condition by building an optimal school layout. This validates that strategic placement of facilities creates popular spots, increases reputation, and eventually achieves the win condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Build a comprehensive school with classrooms, cafeterias, and club rooms placed adjacent to each other to maximize popularity. Focus on creating synergies between compatible facilities, managing the budget efficiently, and progressing through years to increase reputation to the winning threshold.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The school reputation reaches the win threshold (1000 points), triggering the GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test demonstrates that optimal facility placement and progression mechanics lead to victory.
